area-chart.title: Area Chart
area-chart.description: An area chart for visualizing trends with gradient fills, stacked series, and sparkline variants.

bar-chart.title: Bar Chart
bar-chart.description: A bar chart for comparing categorical data with grouped, stacked, and horizontal layout support.

chart-tooltip.title: Chart Tooltip
chart-tooltip.description: A composable tooltip for chart data points with customizable indicators, labels, and value formatters.

composed-chart.title: Composed Chart
composed-chart.description: A composed chart that combines Bar, Line, and Area series in a single cartesian chart for multi-metric dashboards.

line-chart.title: Line Chart
line-chart.description: A line chart for visualizing trends over time with multi-series, sparkline, and custom tooltip support.

pie-chart.title: Pie Chart
pie-chart.description: A pie and donut chart for proportional data with labels, legends, and nested ring support.

radar-chart.title: Radar Chart
radar-chart.description: A radar chart for comparing multivariate data across axes with fill, dot, and multi-series variants.

radial-chart.title: Radial Chart
radial-chart.description: A radial chart for gauge, progress ring, and circular data visualizations with customizable arcs and labels.

agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.description: A composable calendar component with day, week, and month views for displaying and managing events with drag interactions.

action-bar.title: Action Bar
action-bar.description: A floating toolbar for contextual actions — bulk selection, editing controls, or any set of actions that appear in response to user interaction.

carousel.title: Carousel
carousel.description: A content browsing component for navigating through a collection of images or items, with thumbnails, dots, and navigation controls.

data-grid.title: Data Grid
data-grid.description: A full-featured data grid with sorting, selection, column resizing, pinned columns, drag-and-drop row reorder, virtualization, and async loading — built on the HeroUI Table.

empty-state.title: Empty State
empty-state.description: A placeholder for empty views with icon, title, description, and call-to-action to guide users.

file-tree.title: File Tree
file-tree.description: A hierarchical file explorer with expand/collapse, drag-and-drop, icons, and multi-selection support.

floating-toc.title: Floating TOC
floating-toc.description: A floating table of contents that tracks scroll position and provides quick navigation to page sections.

hover-card.title: Hover Card
hover-card.description: A popover card that appears on hover to preview additional content without navigating away.

kanban.title: Kanban
kanban.description: A drag-and-drop kanban board with columns, cards, and keyboard navigation for organizing tasks and workflows.

item-card.title: Item Card
item-card.description: A versatile list card with icon, title, description, and optional trailing actions like switches or selects.

item-card-group.title: Item Card Group
item-card-group.description: A layout component for grouping item cards in list or grid arrangements with section headers and dividers.

kpi.title: KPI
kpi.description: A key performance indicator card displaying a metric value with trend chip, sparkline chart, and contextual details.

kpi-group.title: KPI Group
kpi-group.description: A layout component for arranging multiple KPI cards in horizontal or vertical stacks with consistent spacing.

list-view.title: List View
list-view.description: A single-column interactive list with keyboard navigation, selection, and accessible item actions.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: A composable event-history component for feeds, activity logs, and centered milestone timelines.

widget.title: Widget
widget.description: A dashboard container that wraps charts, tables, KPIs, or any content with a consistent surface treatment — secondary background shell with an elevated white content area.

chain-of-thought.title: Chain Of ThoughtNew
chain-of-thought.description: A collapsible reasoning timeline for assistant thinking, progress, and agent traces.

chat-attachment.title: Chat AttachmentNew
chat-attachment.description: Attachment previews and composer file input helpers for AI chat surfaces.

chat-conversation.title: Chat ConversationNew
chat-conversation.description: A stick-to-bottom conversation viewport for streaming chat messages.

chat-list-view.title: Chat List ViewNew
chat-list-view.description: Thread list rows for chat sidebars and conversation pickers.

chat-loader.title: Chat LoaderNew
chat-loader.description: Loading skeletons and typing placeholders for assistant responses.

chat-message.title: Chat MessageNew
chat-message.description: Composable user and assistant message layouts for AI chat.

chat-message-actions.title: Chat Message ActionsNew
chat-message-actions.description: Inline action buttons for assistant and user messages.

chat-source.title: Chat SourceNew
chat-source.description: Citation chips and grouped source lists for AI responses.

chat-tool.title: Chat ToolNew
chat-tool.description: Collapsible tool-call cards for inputs, outputs, errors, approvals, and grouped tool activity.

code-block.title: Code BlockNew
code-block.description: Syntax-highlighted code blocks with language labels and copy actions for AI markdown.

markdown.title: MarkdownNew
markdown.description: Render AI responses with rich markdown, memoized streaming blocks, and optional Streamdown rendering.

prompt-input.title: Prompt InputNew
prompt-input.description: A composable AI prompt composer with attachments, toolbar actions, send states, queued prompts, and drag-and-drop support.

prompt-suggestion.title: Prompt SuggestionNew
prompt-suggestion.description: Suggested prompts and starter actions for AI chat empty states.

text-shimmer.title: Text ShimmerNew
text-shimmer.description: Animated shimmer text for streaming, thinking, and loading labels.

emoji-reaction-button.title: Emoji Reaction Button
emoji-reaction-button.description: An animated emoji reaction button with count display and toggle state for social interactions.

number-value.title: Number Value
number-value.description: A formatted number display with locale-aware rendering for currency, percentages, and compact notation.

pressable-feedback.title: Pressable Feedback
pressable-feedback.description: A press interaction layer adding ripple, highlight, hold-to-confirm, and progress feedback effects to any element.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: A star rating input with fractional read-only display, custom icons, sizes, and interactive selection.

trend-chip.title: Trend Chip
trend-chip.description: A compact chip displaying a trend direction with percentage value, icon indicator, and contextual suffix.

resizable.title: Resizable
resizable.description: Resizable panel groups with composable handle types and variants. Built on react-resizable-panels, wired up with HeroUI design tokens.

cell-color-picker.title: Cell Color Picker
cell-color-picker.description: A compact color picker styled as a settings cell with preset palettes and custom color input.

cell-select.title: Cell Select
cell-select.description: A compact select input styled as a settings cell, ideal for preference panels and configuration forms.

cell-slider.title: Cell Slider
cell-slider.description: A range slider styled as a settings cell with label, value display, and step configuration.

cell-switch.title: Cell Switch
cell-switch.description: A toggle switch styled as a settings cell with label and description, ideal for preference panels.

checkbox-button-group.title: Checkbox Button Group
checkbox-button-group.description: A multi-selection button group with card-style checkboxes, icons, and custom indicators.

drop-zone.title: Drop Zone
drop-zone.description: A drag-and-drop file upload area with file type filtering, size limits, and file list preview.

inline-select.title: Inline Select
inline-select.description: A minimal inline dropdown that blends into surrounding text for contextual selections without a full form field.

native-select.title: Native Select
native-select.description: A styled wrapper around the native HTML select element with label, description, and validation support.

number-stepper.title: Number Stepper
number-stepper.description: A numeric input with increment/decrement buttons, min/max bounds, step intervals, and custom formatting.

radio-button-group.title: Radio Button Group
radio-button-group.description: A single-selection button group with card-style radio options, icons, and custom indicators.

rich-text-editor.title: Rich Text Editor
rich-text-editor.description: A composable editor with toolbar controls, selection bubble menu, JSON value updates, and character count support.

app-layout.title: AppLayout
app-layout.description: A scaffold layout that composes a full-height sidebar, a sticky navbar, a main content area, and an optional right-side aside panel.

command.title: Command
command.description: A command palette with fuzzy search, keyboard navigation, and nested groups for quick actions.

context-menu.title: Context Menu
context-menu.description: A right-click context menu with nested submenus, selection state, and long-press support for touch.

navbar.title: Navbar
navbar.description: A composable top navigation bar with hide-on-scroll, responsive mobile menu, and client-side routing support.

segment.title: Segment
segment.description: A segmented control for toggling between a small set of mutually exclusive options.

sidebar.title: Sidebar
sidebar.description: A responsive sidebar navigation component with collapsible groups, rail mode, and mobile sheet support.

stepper.title: Stepper
stepper.description: A step-by-step progress indicator with numbered, icon, and bullet variants in horizontal or vertical layouts.

emoji-picker.title: Emoji Picker
emoji-picker.description: A searchable emoji picker with virtualized list, category navigation, skin tone selection, and recent emoji tracking.

sheet.title: Sheet
sheet.description: A bottom sheet overlay with snap points, swipe-to-dismiss, and placement options for mobile-friendly dialogs.
